title: Jujutsu kaisen (Hindi Dubbed)
description: Jujutsu Kaisen is a dark fantasy series that follows high school student Yuji Itadori, who joins a secret society of sorcerers to combat monstrous spiritual entities called "Curses," born from negative human emotions.

title: Re Zero (Hindi dubbed)
description: An ordinary high school student, Natsuki Subaru, finds himself transported to another world after a trip to the convenience store. Lost and confused, he is aided by a silver-haired girl and agrees to help her find something she is looking for in return for her kindness.

episodes.title: The End of the Beginning and the Beginning of the End
Starting Life from Zero in Another World
That’s All This Story Is About

title: Classroom Of The Elite ( Hindi Dubbed)
description:
Kiyotaka Ayanokoji has just enrolled at Tokyo Koudo Ikusei Senior High School, where it's said that 100% of students go on to college or find employment. But he ends up in Class 1-D, which is full of all the school's problem children.

What's more, every month, the school awards students points with a cash value of 100,000 yen, and the classes employ a laissez-faire policy in which talking, sleeping, and even sabotage are permitted during class.

One month later, Ayanokoji, Horikita, and the students of Class D learn the truth of the system in place within their school...

episodes.title: It Takes a Great Talent and Skill to Conceal One’s Talent and Skill
It Takes Hard Work and Dedication to Make an Effort Truly Worthwhile

Man Is Condemned to Be Free
Every Man Has in Himself the Most Dangerous Traitor of All
What People Commonly Call Fate Is Mostly Their Own Stupidity
Genius Lives Only One Story Above Madness

title: Lord Of Mysteries (Hindi Dubbed)
description: In a Victorian world of steam, dreadnoughts, and occult horrors, Zhou Mingrui awakens as Klein Moretti. He walks a razor’s edge between light and darkness, entangled with warring Churches. This is the legend of unlimited potential…and unspeakable danger.

title: Solo leveling (Hindi dubbed)
description:
In a world where "Gates" connect our dimension to a realm of monsters, certain humans have awakened supernatural abilities to fight them. These people are known as Hunters. 
Sung Jinwoo is an E-rank hunter, infamously dubbed the "World's Weakest Hunter". Barely surviving low-level raids to pay his mother's medical bills, he is brutally slaughtered in a high-ranking "Double Dungeon". Just before his death, he is chosen by a mysterious program called the System as its sole "Player". 
This System grants him a unique RPG-like ability: he can level up his strength and skills through daily quests and solo dungeon raids—a feat impossible for other hunters, whose powers are fixed from the moment they awaken. Jinwoo embarks on a journey to uncover the secrets of the dungeons and the true source of his absolute power.

episodes.title: If I Had One More Chance
Let's See How Far I Can Go
A Knight Who Defends an Empty Throne

title: Dragon Ball Super (Hindi Dubbed)
description: The story follows Goku as he encounters Beerus, the God of Destruction, and attains the power of a Super Saiyan God [2, 3]. As the series progresses, Goku and his allies travel across the multiverse to battle powerful foes and compete in high-stakes tournaments, such as the Tournament of Power, to ensure the survival of their universe [2, 4].
